feed.title: Shivam Kaushik
feed.subtitle: Experience in neurogenetics and behavioral neuroscience, I use Drosophila melanogaster to study neural circuits underlying sensory processing, plasticity, learning, and memory. My work investigates taste and olfactory networks and explores molecular mechanisms of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer’s, Parkinson’s, and ALS/FTLD. I integrate optogenetics, confocal microscopy, and many quantitative behavioral assays to investigate neural function in health and disease.
